claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: React portal with a semantically neutral display-contents context div.
semantics.context: React context is retained and native dir, lang, direction, and density attributes are repeated at the portal boundary.
semantics.readingOrder: Portaled content remains at its target's DOM position; consumers must not create a contradictory reading or focus sequence.

ssrHydration.server: Non-disabled portals render only fallback; no document global is read.
ssrHydration.firstClientRender: Matches the server fallback exactly, then portals after the mount effect.
ssrHydration.disabled: Inline mode remains deterministic on server and client and performs no portal movement or target lookup.
ssrHydration.fallbackOptOut: A null fallback emits no temporary DOM or accessibility output before mount.

consumerResponsibilities: Provide an accessible fallback when server-visible information or status is required.
Keep aria-labelledby, aria-describedby, and control relationships mounted with globally unique IDs.
Coordinate interactive portal content through LayerManager and the owning focus primitive.
Ensure the portal target is stable and not inside an inert application root for modal content.
